steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The assignment has $x$ one-point questions and $y$ two-point questions. The total must equal 28. We need an equation relating $x$, $y$, and 28.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '$x + y = 28$': counts questions, not points. ✗
  • Choice B — '$2x + y = 28$': gives 1-point questions double weight and 2-point questions single weight — reversed. ✗
  • Choice C — '$x + y = 14$': unrelated to the 28-point total. ✗
  • Choice D — '$x + 2y = 28$': $x$ one-point questions contribute $x$ points; $y$ two-point questions contribute $2y$ points; total $= 28$. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
